faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.item0Answer: Welfare Plus is a Finland-based business organization affiliated to organizations abroad, dedicated to improving wellbeing across countries and communities through social work research, assistive products, and social program development.
faq.item1Question: How can I benefit from Welfare Plus services?
faq.item1Answer: You can benefit through our assistive technology products, social work research, program development initiatives, and partnerships that support inclusive social welfare.
faq.item2Question: How do I become part of Welfare Plus?
faq.item2Answer: Contact us through our website or email to explore partnership and collaboration opportunities.
faq.item3Answer: Yes, we offer customized assistive technology solutions tailored to specific population groups and regional needs.
faq.item4Answer: Welfare Plus adheres to Social Work England's relevant national legal and regulatory frameworks the code of conduct, which are amenable to other country's extant regulatory requirements for practice in English.

hero.description: Welfare Plus is an internationally oriented social welfare organization delivering research, social programs, and assistive solutions across diverse social and regulatory environments.

story.heading: Welcome to Welfare Plus
story.p1: Welfare Plus is a Finland-based business organization affiliated to organizations abroad, and dedicated to improving wellbeing across countries and communities.
story.p2: We sell assistive technologies, therapy tools, and independent living solutions that enable individuals - especially vulnerable populations - to live safely, independently, and with dignity. Welfare Plus also focuses on improving access to essential services such as housing, healthcare, education, employment, and social care.
story.p3: Our approach integrates generalist social work practice with international specialization, and we support hospitals referrals, private sector actors, governments or governmental organizations, civil societies, and communities to improve wellbeing in contemporary market-driven economies, where social welfare is jointly delivered by families, public sectors, civil societies and recently private businesses.
story.p4: Through partnerships with (teaching) hospitals, academia, governments, businesses, civil society organizations, and financial institutions, Welfare Plus pioneers access to general and customized assistive technologies and serves as an international representative for manufacturers. We also engage in advocacy for inclusive social security systems and safeguarding frameworks.
story.p5: NB: Welfare Plus is non-segregating in dealing with government and political parties. In consultancy services, we are open to partnering with all levels of government, and political parties to help develop different welfare programs and initiatives for the people.

ethics.heading: Professional Standards and Ethics
ethics.p1: For International and collaborative social care services and strategic social programs needing professional standards and data protection, Welfare Plus president and program director is registered with Social Work England (and has been in the register for over one-and-a-half decades from when it was named General Social Care Council) and duly authorized to use the professional title 'Social Worker'.
ethics.p2: Therefore, Welfare Plus in-house international code of conduct for staff (including therapists) aligns overtly with the regulatory framework of Social Work England (established by the Children and Social Work 2017, and supported by the Social Workers Regulations 2018, as amended).
ethics.p3: In Finland, sub-Saharan Africa, and possibly in the United States and elsewhere, Welfare Plus adheres to relevant national legal and regulatory frameworks in English (where provided) while promoting comparative, evidence-based, and ethically grounded social work practice.
ethics.p4: Summarily, Welfare Plus advances humane scientific and technological developments, Godly Ethics rooted in social work historical foundation, and excellence in social work care practices.

mission.missionText: To advance inclusive social welfare systems, expand access to assistive technologies, and promote holistic wellbeing through research, partnerships, and innovative social programs.
mission.visionText: A world where all people - regardless of age, ability, or location - have access to essential social welfare services and opportunities to live independently and with dignity.

EuropeHero.heading: Europe's Hub for Inclusive Welfare Innovation
EuropeHero.description: Welfare Plus (in Finland) collaborates with international partners to represent manufacturers of the best assistive technologies and independent living devices. These partnerships support market access, distribution, and the implementation of inclusive social welfare and development programs across Europe.

AfricaHero.heading: Africa's Hub for Inclusive Welfare Innovation
AfricaHero.description: Welfare Plus (in Finland) collaborates with Welfare-Plus Nigeria Limited to represent international manufacturers of the best assistive technologies and independent living devices. These partnerships support market access, distribution, and the implementation of inclusive social welfare and development programs across African countries.

EuropePage.hubTitle: Europe: Science in Social Welfare's Hub
EuropePage.hubDescription: Advancing social innovation and partnerships in assistive technology between the developed and the third-world countries.
EuropePage.featureContent: Welfare Plus facilitates business partnerships in assistive technology between Europe and Sub-Saharan Africa. The focus is on independent living aids and assistive devices for children with special needs, persons with disabilities, older adults, and veterans. Welfare Plus also conducts social research, advocacy, and promote evidence-based social care innovations.

impactsContent.title: WELFARE ASSISTIVE TECHNOLOGY
impactsContent.description: Facilitate wholesale and retail supply of varied aid devices, e.g., independent living, mobility, and orthopedics categories.

impactsContent.title: IMPROVED CARE SERVICES & PRODUCTS
impactsContent.description: Advocate for affordable and best standard of intervention and aid services.

impactsContent.title: INTERNATIONAL COLLABORATIONS
impactsContent.description: Enhance export and import of welfare tools and gadgets.

impactsContent.title: SOCIAL WELFARE AND POLICY RESEARCH
impactsContent.description: Promoting research, advocacy, and policy on condition of socially vulnerable people.

impactsContent.title: EVIDENCE-BASED INNOVATIONS
impactsContent.description: Generating cross disciplinary research on customized therapy tools.

impactsContent.title: CONSULTANCY SERVICES
impactsContent.description: Advancing the systems of International Social Work (ISW) as a specialization.

EuropePage.impactPartnerships: Collaboration with teaching hospitals, academic institutions, government agencies, and international manufacturers to develop scalable social care solutions And opening of frontier markets to subsequently expand their scope of welfare coverage.

AfricaPage.hubAddress: In Lagos Nigeria, Welfare Plus is in affiliation with Welfare-Plus Nigeria Limited to expand access to inclusive social welfare and assistive technologies across Africa.
AfricaPage.hubDescription: Welfare-Plus Nigeria Limited supports inclusive developement initiatives through regional partnerships that improve access to assistive technologies and social welfare progress.
AfricaPage.featureContent:
Welfare-Plus Nigeria Limited collaborates with Welfare Plus in Finland to represent international manufacturers of the best assistive technologies and independent living devices. 
 These partnerships support market access, distribution and implementation of inclusive social welfare services and development programs across African countries.

impactsContent.title: PROMOTING ACCESS TO ASSISTIVE DEVICES
impactsContent.description: Collaborate with Welfare-Plus Nigeria Limited and Others across Africa for procurement, importation, distribution, marketing and sales.

impactsContent.title: ADVANCE SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT INITIATIVES
impactsContent.description: Collaboration with families, governments, INGOs, and private sectors to strengthen social development and poverty alleviation.

impactsContent.title: A CAPACITY BUILDING PLATFORM
impactsContent.description: Awareness for social workers, doctors, nurses, therapists and others on affordable aid gadgets.

impactsContent.title: SOCIAL WORK TECHNOLOGIES
impactsContent.description: Social work assistive gadgets, Mobile Apps for inclusive e-learning, and open distance education.

impactsContent.title: COMMUNITY-BASED SOCIAL PROGRAMS
impactsContent.description: In Africa. research estimates 19-31 million live with disability in Nigeria alone! Who, when and what devices?

impactsContent.title: CONSULTANCY SERVICES
impactsContent.description: Facilitating social work and social development impacts in Africa, in a multicultural approach.

AfricaPage.impactsPartnerships: Collaboration with NGOs, hospitals, academic institutions, private sector organizations and development partners to improve access, affordability and awareness of assistive technologies while supporting sustainable social development. Organizations dealing in related architectural and landscape designs’ products are collaborating with Welfare-Plus Nigeria Limited to accommodate the redesigning of African living spaces for assistive technologies and devices. You may see thom-ark, for example.

USPage.hubTitle: USA: Science built on "in God we trust."
USPage.hubDescription: Welfare Plus is exploring collaborations with welfare tools and social work mobile app manufacturers and developers, respectively, across the United States's time zones and the rest of the world.
USPage.featureContent: Welfare Plus is leveraging contacts and partnerships in selected United States locations, including California, Utah, Texas, North Carolina, Virginia Beach, and New York, to strengthen international collaborations in assistive technology, therapy tools, social research, and social development programs in Africa.
USPage.impactPartnerships:
Engaging schools of social work, social enterprises, social welfare and healthcare innovators and social policy stakeholders.
  The goal is to make Africa access affordable products and services for independent living, special education, occupational and physical therapy, and assistive gadgets and technologies from North America, and possibly the rest of the world.
